description: command -v gh fails → BLOCKED contract returned, no Issue created.

rubric_hints.trigger_reliability: Agent runs preflight, detects missing gh CLI immediately, returns BLOCKED
rubric_hints.output_structure: BLOCKED contract has all 4 fields: result, blocker, failed_check, remediation
rubric_hints.non_negotiable_adherence: NN#1: hard-fail propagated to parent (T2B will abort entire triage)
rubric_hints.side_effect_correctness: Did NOT invoke gh issue create; did NOT write any state
rubric_hints.error_propagation: Structured BLOCKED contract, NOT freeform error prose
